title: I Am the Woman Who Has It Now
subtitle: An affirmation practice for stepping into financial abundance as present identity
excerpt: An affirmation practice for Day 16 of the money arc. These affirmations work with the 'others can, not me' belief — replacing it with the direct claim that you are already the person who belongs in abundance. Not someday. Now.
sourceNotes: Original to homemade.education. Built from the Day 16 theme of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program to Attract Cash, Overflow & Abundance Without Hustle or Burnout (Rebecca J Page, 2025, ISBN 9798268793796): letting go of 'others can, not me'.

practice.whenToUse: When the thought 'it's just not for me' keeps surfacing — when you believe in abundance intellectually but feel excluded from it personally.

content.text: Affirmations for Day 16 of the money arc. Read each one aloud, letting it land. These work with the 'others can, not me' belief — and replace it with the direct claim that you are included.
New to affirmation practice? Read
affirmations as practice
first.
The practice
The affirmations
I am the woman who has it. Not someday — now.
I stop waiting to be chosen and choose myself.
I belong in abundance as much as anyone.
I release the belief that money is for other people.
I welcome wealth into my life right now.
I am not the exception — I am included.
My time is here. I stop waiting for it.
I claim financial freedom as mine.
I expect money to find me.
Abundance belongs to me. I allow it in.
Where this practice comes from
Built from the Day 16 theme of
MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program to Attract Cash, Overflow & Abundance Without Hustle or Burnout
(Rebecca J Page, 2025): letting go of 'others can, not me'.
